deviceTarget: physical iPhone or native simulator label

evidence: Public silent-prayer list route loaded through API with HTTP 200.
Guest join used REST heartbeat endpoint and RTDB public aggregate count changed 0 -> 1 -> 0.
Brother sign-in resolved through API session and brother silent-prayer list loaded with HTTP 200.
Brother join used REST heartbeat endpoint and RTDB private aggregate count changed 0 -> 1 -> 0 with API-issued read grant.
Client reads/writes outside aggregate count paths were denied by RTDB rules.
No participant, session, user, roster, or prayer-history data was visible to the app.
Leaving the screen unsubscribed the listener, sent REST leave, and aggregate count decremented after leave or expiry.
